Headline: #8 Halsted and #70 Division Temporary Reroute near Haslted/Division
ShortDescription: 8 Halsted and 70 Division buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near Halsted/Division, due to street blockage near Halsted/Division.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How will this affect my trip?

 

#8 Halsted and #70 Division buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near Halsted/Division, due to street blockage near Halsted/Division.

Southbound #8 Halsted buses will operate via Halsted, Division, North Branch, Halsted and over regular route

Northbound #8 Halsted buses will operate via Halsted, North Branch, Division, Halsted and over regular route.

Westbound #70 Division buses will operate via Division, Halsted, North Branch, Division and over regular route

Allow extra travel time.
